title: cranichis pulvinifera
intro: Cranichis pulvinifera, also known as the clubbed orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can help protect against infections and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to relieve respiratory symptoms and promote overall well-being.
